g.text: Sipher + SIP Protocol: remote control + privacy engine
Sipher makes SIP callable by agents. SIP packages known privacy primitives and delegates final settlement to chain backends.
SIP primitives: generateStealthAddress(), commit(), viewing keys
Sipher is not itself a Zcash wallet.
SIP uses Zcash by delegating to zcashd.
Cross-chain-to-ZEC routing still needs real bridge proof.
